Jetson FFmpeg 6.1 runtime for Ubuntu 22.04 / arm64.

Contents:
- libavcodec.so.60
- libavformat.so.60
- libavutil.so.58
- libswresample.so.4
- libswscale.so.7

These files were prepared from the local `scripts/jetson/prepare-ffmpeg-runtime.sh`
workflow and are the minimal runtime set needed by the Jetson host.
